languages.text: "Святейший Себериан фон Валанциус! Воистину, воплощение надежды и воли Бога-Императора для всего 32-го полка. Я... я и мечтать не смела увидеть вас вживую". {n}Голос Ведки дрожит о чувств, но уцелевший глаз внимательно изучает каждую деталь лица вашего предка.{/n}

"Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Святейший Себериан фон Валанциус! Воистину, воплощение надежды и воли Бога-Императора для всего 32-го полка. Я... я и мечтать не смела увидеть вас вживую". {n}Голос Ведки дрожит о чувств, но уцелевший глаз внимательно изучает каждую деталь лица вашего предка.{/n}

I never dared dream to see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her surviving eye studies every detail of your ancestor's face intently.{/n}

"Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}

languages.text: "Hochheiliger Seberian von Valancius! Die Verkörperung von Hoffnung und des Willens des Gottimperator für das gesamte 32. Regiment. Ich ... Ich hätte nie zu träumen gewagt, Euch einmal persönlich zu treffen." {n}Vedkas Stimme zittert vor Emotionen, aber ihr verbliebenes Auge studiert jedes Detail im Gesicht deines Ahnherren.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Hochheiliger Seberian von Valancius! Die Verkörperung von Hoffnung und des Willens des Gottimperator für das gesamte 32. Regiment. Ich ... Ich hätte nie zu träumen gewagt, Euch einmal persönlich zu treffen." {n}Vedkas Stimme zittert vor Emotionen, aber ihr verbliebenes Auge studiert jedes Detail im Gesicht deines Ahnherren.{/n}

languages.text: « Très vénéré Seberian von Valancius ! Vous êtes l'incarnation de l'espoir et de la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu pour tout le 32e régiment. Je... je n'aurais jamais cru vous voir un jour de mes propres yeux. » {n}La voix de Vedka est tremblante d'émotion, mais son seul œil valide étudie chaque détail du visage de votre ancêtre.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Très vénéré Seberian von Valancius ! Vous êtes l'incarnation de l'espoir et de la volonté de l'Empereur-Dieu pour tout le 32e régiment. Je... je n'aurais jamais cru vous voir un jour de mes propres yeux. » {n}La voix de Vedka est tremblante d'émotion, mais son seul œil valide étudie chaque détail du visage de votre ancêtre.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Santísimo Seberian von Valancius! Verdaderamente, la encarnación de la esperanza y de la voluntad del Dios Emperador para el 32.º regimiento. Ni... ni en sueños me habría atrevido a esperar verlo en persona». {n}La voz de Vedka tiembla de emoción, pero el ojo que le queda no deja de estudiar los detalles de la cara de tu antepasado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Santísimo Seberian von Valancius! Verdaderamente, la encarnación de la esperanza y de la voluntad del Dios Emperador para el 32.º regimiento. Ni... ni en sueños me habría atrevido a esperar verlo en persona». {n}La voz de Vedka tiembla de emoción, pero el ojo que le queda no deja de estudiar los detalles de la cara de tu antepasado.{/n}

languages.text: "Kutsal Seberian von Valancius! Gerçekten de umudun ve Tanrı İmparator'un tüm 32. Alay için iradesinin tecessümü. Ben... Sizi kanlı canlı görebileceğimi hayal bile edemezdim." {n}Vedka'nın sesi titriyor, gözüyse atanın yüzündeki her bir detayı dikkatle inceliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Kutsal Seberian von Valancius! Gerçekten de umudun ve Tanrı İmparator'un tüm 32. Alay için iradesinin tecessümü. Ben... Sizi kanlı canlı görebileceğimi hayal bile edemezdim." {n}Vedka'nın sesi titriyor, gözüyse atanın yüzündeki her bir detayı dikkatle inceliyor.{/n}

languages.text: “至高无上的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯！您简直就是我们第32团全体官兵心目中希望和神皇意志的化身。我……我做梦都没想过可以见到您本人。”{n}薇德卡的声音激动得发抖，但她那仅剩的眼睛却紧紧盯着你先祖的脸，不放过任何细节。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “至高无上的塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯！您简直就是我们第32团全体官兵心目中希望和神皇意志的化身。我……我做梦都没想过可以见到您本人。”{n}薇德卡的声音激动得发抖，但她那仅剩的眼睛却紧紧盯着你先祖的脸，不放过任何细节。{/n}

languages.text: 「聖なるシベリア・フォン・ヴァランキウス様！誠に、希望の化身であり、32連隊全体に対する神帝の御意志の具現化です。私は…まさか、生身で御姿を拝見できるとは夢にも思いませんでした。」{n}ヴェドカの口調は感情に揺れながらも、残された眼は祖先の顔の細部を鋭く注いでいます。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Most holy Seberian von Valancius! Truly, the embodiment of hope and the God-Emperor's will for the entire 32nd Regiment. I... I never dared dream I'd see you in the flesh." {n}Vedka's voice trembles with emotion, yet her remaining eye intently studies every detail of your ancestor's face.{/n}
